name: MongoDB 7
compose:
services:
  mongo:
    image: mongo:7
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: ${MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME}
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD}
    ports:
      - '27017:27017'
    volumes:
      - mongo-data:/data/db
volumes:
  mongo-data:
